allow: WebFetch(domain:sidestep.design)

Bash(node scripts/dag-update.js add-node "1-01" "Project Scaffolding" "phase-1" "infrastructure" --desc "Bootstrap the full tech stack: Next.js App Router with TypeScript and Tailwind, Convex backend, Clerk and Resend SDKs installed, environment variables documented. No features — just a runnable foundation." --prd "docs/prd/sidestep-website-phase1.md#6-implementation-decisions" --criteria "npm run dev starts without errors|Convex dev server connects|Clerk, Resend, Convex packages installed|.env.local.example documents all required vars|TypeScript and ESLint compile clean")

Bash(node scripts/dag-update.js add-node "1-02" "Database Schema" "phase-1" "infrastructure" --desc "Define all Convex schema tables: users, designs, orders, jerseyRuns, jerseyRunResponses, and intakes. Includes field types, optional fields, and indexes for common query patterns." --prd "docs/prd/sidestep-website-phase1.md#5-scope" --criteria "All 6 tables defined in convex/schema.ts|Indexes defined for captainId and jerseyRunId|npx convex dev starts without schema errors|Basic queries for each table return expected shape")

Bash(node scripts/dag-update.js add-node "1-03" "Authentication Flows" "phase-1" "infrastructure" --desc "Wire up Clerk authentication: self-registration, invite-link registration \(pre-fills order form from intake\), Convex user sync via webhook, admin flag in Clerk privateMetadata, and Resend email on new self-registration." --prd "docs/prd/sidestep-website-phase1.md#6-implementation-decisions" --criteria "Self-registration creates user in Convex users table|Invite link pre-fills order form from intake record|/portal and /admin routes protected by Clerk middleware|Admin flag only readable server-side|Resend email sent to info@sidestep.design on self-registration")

Bash(node scripts/dag-update.js add-node "1-04" "Application Shell" "phase-1" "infrastructure" --desc "Three Next.js App Router layouts: public marketing \(nav + footer\), authenticated portal \(sidebar + user menu\), and admin \(admin sidebar\). Fully responsive, mobile-first, Sidestep brand colors applied." --prd "docs/prd/sidestep-website-phase1.md#7-technical-constraints" --criteria "Three distinct layouts with correct route groups|All layouts responsive at 375px, 768px, 1280px|Nav active states highlight current route|Sidestep teal and logo applied|Mobile hamburger menu works on portal and admin")

Bash(node scripts/dag-update.js add-node "2-05" "Design Creation" "phase-2" "feature" --desc "Design creation form in the portal: title, brief, optional Canva link, multi-file upload \(any file type\) to Convex storage. Design detail page with download links. Edit mode to add more files." --prd "docs/prd/sidestep-website-phase1.md#5-scope" --criteria "Form creates design record in Convex with uploaded file IDs|Files stored in Convex storage and retrievable via URL|Design appears in portal dashboard after save|Design detail shows all files as download links|Upload progress indicator shown")

Bash(node scripts/dag-update.js add-node "2-06" "Order Creation" "phase-2" "feature" --desc "Full order creation form: team name, sport, quantity, jersey style, neckline, sleeve style, own-design checkbox, and design-linking multi-select. Creates order with initial Inquiry internal stage." --prd "docs/prd/sidestep-website-phase1.md#4-user-stories" --criteria "Order created in Convex with all required fields|Initial internalStages set to Inquiry|Captain can link existing designs to the order|Order appears in dashboard with Order Started status chip|Redirects to order detail page after creation")

Bash(node scripts/dag-update.js add-node "2-07" "Order Status Tracking" "phase-2" "feature" --desc "Order detail page in the portal: 8-stage customer-facing timeline, linked designs, order specs. Real-time Convex subscription. Internal stage names never shown to customer." --prd "docs/prd/sidestep-website-phase1.md#8-success-metrics" --criteria "8 customer-facing stages shown as visual timeline|Current stage highlighted, past stages marked complete|Stage derives from internalStages in real-time|Internal stage names not visible to customer|Linked designs shown with download links")

Bash(node scripts/dag-update.js add-node "2-08" "Jersey Run Creation" "phase-2" "feature" --desc "Captain creates a jersey run from the order detail page: jersey sizes, names mode \(open/fixed\), fixed roster, custom questions, deadline. Generates a shareable public URL." --prd "docs/prd/sidestep-website-phase1.md#4-user-stories" --criteria "Jersey run created with namesMode, sizes, customQuestions, and deadline|Fixed roster allows captain to pre-define names and numbers|Shareable link /run/<id> generated and displayed with copy button|Link is accessible without authentication|Up to 5 custom questions can be added")

Bash(node scripts/dag-update.js add-node "2-09" "Jersey Run Public Form" "phase-2" "feature" --desc "Public fan submission form at /run/<id>: no account required. Adapts to open vs fixed names mode. Warns on blank name or number. Shows closed state when deadline passes or run is closed." --prd "docs/prd/sidestep-website-phase1.md#4-user-stories" --criteria "Accessible at /run/<id> without authentication|Blank name or number triggers warning before submit|Fixed mode shows roster dropdown, open mode shows free text|Submission creates jerseyRunResponse record|Closed state shown when run is expired or closed")

Bash(node scripts/dag-update.js add-node "2-10" "Jersey Run Captain Dashboard" "phase-2" "feature" --desc "Authenticated captain view of their jersey run responses: live table of all submissions, participation count, deadline countdown, and running price estimate. Real-time via Convex." --prd "docs/prd/sidestep-website-phase1.md#4-user-stories" --criteria "Response table shows name, email, size, jersey name/number, custom answers|Participation count displayed prominently|Deadline countdown shows days remaining|Running price estimate shown using pricing tiers|Data updates in real-time without page refresh")

Bash(node scripts/dag-update.js add-node "2-11" "Admin Order Overview" "phase-2" "feature" --desc "Admin-only order list across all customers: sortable table with team name, captain, sport, quantity, internal stage, date. Clicking opens admin order detail with all fields and captain contact info." --prd "docs/prd/sidestep-website-phase1.md#4-user-stories" --criteria "Admin-only route returns 403 for non-admin users|Orders table shows all customers orders with correct columns|Sortable by any column|Admin order detail shows captain email and all order fields|Admin designs list shows all designs system-wide")

Bash(node scripts/dag-update.js add-node "2-12" "Admin Stage Management" "phase-2" "feature" --desc "14-stage internal checklist on admin order detail: admin checks/unchecks stages with timestamps. Completing a stage triggers real-time customer-facing stage update in the portal." --prd "docs/prd/sidestep-website-phase1.md#4-user-stories" --criteria "All 14 internal stages shown as checklist with timestamps|Checking a stage sets completedAt timestamp|Unchecking clears the timestamp|Customer portal stage updates in real-time after admin checks a stage|Non-admin users cannot call adminUpdateOrderStages mutation")

Bash(node scripts/dag-update.js add-node "2-13" "Admin Customer Management" "phase-2" "feature" --desc "Admin customer list with New badge for recent signups, intake leads list with Send Invite Link button, and inline editing for any order, design, or customer record field." --prd "docs/prd/sidestep-website-phase1.md#4-user-stories" --criteria "Customer list shows all users with registration date and New badge within 7 days|Leads list shows all intake submissions with invite link copy button|Admin can inline-edit any order, design, or customer field|All mutations enforce admin-only access|New self-registered users appear prominently")

Bash(node scripts/dag-update.js add-node "3-01" "Jersey Run Deadline Enforcement" "phase-3" "feature" --desc "Convex daily cron job closes expired jersey runs and sends Resend emails to captain and Sidestep admin. Reusable close logic also wired to manual admin close button in 3-02." --prd "docs/prd/sidestep-website-phase1.md#5-scope" --criteria "Cron runs daily and closes all runs where deadline < now|Resend email sent to captain and info@sidestep.design on close|Already-closed runs are skipped|Manual close by admin triggers same emails|Expired runs show closed state on public form")

Bash(node scripts/dag-update.js add-node "3-02" "Admin Jersey Run Oversight" "phase-3" "feature" --desc "Admin page listing all jersey runs system-wide: team, captain, response count, deadline, status. Full response detail view per run. Manual close button reusing the cron closure logic." --prd "docs/prd/sidestep-website-phase1.md#4-user-stories" --criteria "Admin jersey runs list shows all runs across all customers|Clicking a run shows full response table with all fields|Close run button sets status to closed and sends emails|Closed runs show badge and disabled close button|Non-admin users cannot access")

Bash(node scripts/dag-update.js add-node "3-03" "Admin Data Export" "phase-3" "feature" --desc "CSV export button on admin order detail. Downloads a file with order info and all jersey run responses formatted for supplier handoff. Admin-only API route." --prd "docs/prd/sidestep-website-phase1.md#4-user-stories" --criteria "Export CSV button triggers browser file download|CSV includes all jersey run response rows when run exists|CSV includes single order row when no run exists|Filename is sidestep-order-<team>-<date>.csv|Non-admin request to export API returns 403")

Bash(node scripts/dag-update.js add-node "3-04" "Customer Participation History" "phase-3" "feature" --desc "Participated In section in the portal dashboard: shows jersey runs the customer submitted responses to \(matched by email\), with team name, jersey details, and submission date. Read-only." --prd "docs/prd/sidestep-website-phase1.md#4-user-stories" --criteria "Participated In section shows on portal dashboard|Entries matched by respondentEmail to logged-in user email|Each entry shows team name, size, jersey name, number, and submission date|Empty state when no participations|Read-only in Phase 1")

Bash(node scripts/dag-update.js add-node "3-05" "SEO Performance and Polish" "phase-3" "improvement" --desc "Final pre-launch pass: Next.js metadata on all pages, OG image, Next.js Image optimization, jersey photos added, Lighthouse score >= 85 mobile, axe accessibility audit, zero TypeScript/ESLint errors." --prd "docs/prd/sidestep-website-phase1.md#7-technical-constraints" --criteria "Every page has unique title and meta description|OG image set on homepage|Lighthouse Performance >= 85 on mobile|Lighthouse Accessibility >= 90 on all public pages|TypeScript compiles clean with zero errors")
Bash(node scripts/dag-update.js add-edge "1-01" "1-02")
Bash(node scripts/dag-update.js add-edge "1-02" "1-03")
Bash(node scripts/dag-update.js add-edge "1-03" "1-04")
Bash(node scripts/dag-update.js add-edge "1-04" "2-01")
Bash(node scripts/dag-update.js add-edge "1-04" "2-02")
Bash(node scripts/dag-update.js status)
Bash(npm --version)
Bash(npx --version)
Bash(node *)
Bash(npx --yes create-next-app@latest . --typescript --tailwind --eslint --app --no-src-dir --import-alias "@/*" --use-npm --yes --turbopack)
Bash(npx --yes create-next-app@latest .next-scaffold --typescript --tailwind --eslint --app --no-src-dir --import-alias "@/*" --use-npm --yes --turbopack)

Bash(npm view *)
